column1: Young Martin had been sent on _____ errand to the grocer.
At first we were in one room and then we went into _____ room.
The insurance offices were on _____ side of the street.
He pulled on _____ glove and said that, though it was late, he would run along to his office.
"We can do as well as _____ people", my aunt said.
He said that he would ring Charles up as soon as he got home. Then he talked of _____ things all the way.
Some children like milk chocolate, _____ children prefer plain chocolate.
When I returned home I found my wife talking to our neighbor. _____ guests had gone.
